error.invalid_gateway_ip: Invalid gateway address format. Enter IP address, hostname, or hostname:port (e.g., 192.168.1.1, gateway.local, gateway.local:8080)

gateway_unreachable.title: The Keys gateway is unreachable
gateway_unreachable.description:
The gateway at `{gateway_host}` has been unreachable for {consecutive_failures} consecutive poll cycles.

Please check:
- The gateway device is powered on and connected to your network
- Your router's port forwarding rule is still active
- The gateway's local IP address hasn't changed (DHCP reassignment)

Updates will resume automatically once the gateway is reachable again.
